headline: Duke Energy Foundation awards $50,000 to organizations honoring and supporting Florida veterans
summary: As Memorial Day approaches, the Duke Energy Foundation is awarding $50,000 to five nonprofit organizations honoring and supporting Florida veterans. These grants – part of the Foundation's America250 initiative – will primarily help provide former service members with valuable job readiness skills, resources and connections as they transition to civilian life.

headline: Duke Energy Foundation Invests Over $250,000 to Support Veterans' Career Pathways Across 6 States
summary: As Memorial Day approaches and communities honor the sacrifices of U.S. service members and their families, the Duke Energy Foundation is investing more than $250,000 to help veterans gain job-ready skills and build pathways to in-demand civilian careers.

raw.headline: Duke Energy Foundation Invests Over $250,000 to Support Veterans' Career Pathways Across 6 States

headline: NextEra Energy: Buying The Dominion Deal
summary: NextEra Energy announces a $66.8B all-stock merger with Dominion Energy, creating a 10M-customer utility and 110GW generation fleet. For more on NEE & D stocks.
